abort.already_configured: Span Panel already configured. Only a single configuration is possible.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Span Panel
abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network
abort.no_host: No host address was provided by the add-on.
abort.no_serial: Could not determine the panel serial number.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The panel at this address has a different serial number. You cannot switch to a different panel during reconfiguration.
abort.v1_not_supported: v1 firmware is not supported. Please upgrade your panel firmware to v2.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Span Panel
error.fqdn_registration_failed: Could not register the domain name with the panel or the TLS certificate was not updated in time.
error.proximity_failed: Proximity not proven. Please open and close the panel door 3 times and try again.

progress.registering_fqdn: Registering domain name with the panel and waiting for TLS certificate update. This may take up to 60 seconds...

data_description.hop_passphrase: The passphrase used to authenticate with the SPAN Panel v2 API

auth_passphrase.description: Enter the passphrase for your SPAN Panel. This is printed on the panel label or set by the panel owner.
auth_passphrase.title: Panel Passphrase

auth_proximity.description: Open and close the SPAN Panel door 3 times, then select the confirmation below.

menu_options.auth_proximity_confirm: I have opened and closed the door

auth_proximity.title: Proximity Authentication

data_description.entity_naming_pattern: Friendly names use circuit labels from the panel. Tab-based names use breaker tab numbers for stable entity IDs.

choose_entity_naming_initial.description: Choose how circuit-related entities are named in Home Assistant.
choose_entity_naming_initial.title: Circuit entity naming

confirm_discovery.description: Do you want to setup Span Panel at {host}?
confirm_discovery.title: Connect to the Span Panel

fqdn_failed.description: The domain name could not be registered with the panel, or the TLS certificate was not updated in time. You may continue, but the MQTT connection may fail if the panel's certificate does not include your domain name.
fqdn_failed.title: Domain Registration

reauth_confirm.description: The Span Panel at {host} requires re-authentication.
reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Span Panel

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the SPAN Panel

reconfigure.description: Update the host address for this SPAN Panel. The panel serial number must match.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SPAN Panel

reconfigure_fqdn_failed.description: The domain name could not be registered with the panel, or the TLS certificate was not updated in time. You may continue, but the MQTT connection may fail if the panel's certificate does not include your domain name.
reconfigure_fqdn_failed.title: Domain Registration

data_description.enable_energy_dip_compensation: Automatically compensate when the panel reports lower energy readings, preventing spikes in the energy dashboard.
data_description.energy_display_precision: Number of decimal places for energy values (0-3)
data_description.host: IP address or hostname of SPAN Panel
data_description.http_port: HTTP port for the panel API (default: 80)
data_description.power_display_precision: Number of decimal places for power values (0-3)

user.description: Enter the connection details for your SPAN Panel.
user.title: Connect to the Span Panel

circuit_priority_failed.message: Failed to set circuit priority for {circuit}.

circuit_relay_failed.message: Failed to set circuit relay state for {circuit}.

export_manifest_no_entries.message: No SPAN panel configuration entries are loaded. Add and configure a SPAN panel before calling this service.

favorite_not_span_entity.message: Entity {entity_id} is not a SPAN Panel entity. Pick a circuit, BESS, or EVSE sensor.

favorite_no_device.message: Entity {entity_id} is not attached to a device. Pick a SPAN circuit or sub-device sensor.

favorite_subdevice_no_span_parent.message: Sub-device {entity_id} has no SPAN Panel parent device — its via_device_id does not point at a SPAN panel.

favorite_no_unique_id.message: Entity {entity_id} has no unique id and cannot be resolved to a SPAN target.

favorite_no_circuit_uuid.message: Could not derive a favorite target from entity {entity_id}. Pick a circuit sensor (current/power) or a sub-device sensor.

gfe_override_failed.message: Failed to send GFE override to the panel.

panel_auth_failed.message: Authentication with the SPAN Panel failed. Please reauthenticate.

panel_connection_failed.message: Failed to connect to the SPAN Panel at {host}.

panel_not_ready.message: The SPAN Panel is not ready. Please check that the panel is online.

data_description.show_panel: Display the SPAN Panel dashboard as a sidebar entry.
data_description.panel_admin_only: Restrict the dashboard sidebar entry to admin users.
data_description.enable_circuit_net_energy_sensors: Net energy per circuit, accounting for reactive power.
data_description.enable_energy_dip_compensation: Compensate when panel reports lower energy readings. Disabling clears offsets.
data_description.enable_panel_net_energy_sensors: Net energy for main meter and feed-through, accounting for bidirectional flows.
data_description.enable_unmapped_circuit_sensors: Backing sensors for tabs not assigned to named breakers.
data_description.energy_reporting_grace_period: Minutes sensors hold last value when panel is offline (0–60). Default: 15.
data_description.snapshot_update_interval: Seconds between snapshot rebuilds (0–15). Lower = faster, more CPU. 0 = no debounce.

export_circuit_manifest.description: Returns a structured circuit manifest for all configured SPAN panels: serial, host, and per-circuit power sensor entity IDs, layout template identifiers (clone_{{tab}}), device types, and breaker tab numbers. Intended for dashboard cards and automations that need panel topology without querying the entity registry. This is a response-only service; the response may list zero panels if nothing can be resolved.
export_circuit_manifest.name: Export circuit manifest

set_circuit_threshold.name: Set circuit threshold
set_circuit_threshold.description: Set current monitoring thresholds for a specific circuit.

continuous_threshold_pct.name: Continuous threshold (%)
continuous_threshold_pct.description: Percentage of breaker rating for continuous load alerts.

spike_threshold_pct.name: Spike threshold (%)
spike_threshold_pct.description: Percentage of breaker rating for instantaneous spike alerts.

window_duration_m.name: Window duration (minutes)
window_duration_m.description: How long current must stay above threshold before alerting.

cooldown_duration_m.name: Cooldown duration (minutes)
cooldown_duration_m.description: Minutes between repeated alerts for the same circuit.

monitoring_enabled.name: Monitoring enabled
monitoring_enabled.description: Enable or disable monitoring for this circuit.

clear_circuit_threshold.name: Clear circuit threshold
clear_circuit_threshold.description: Remove per-circuit threshold overrides, reverting to global defaults.

set_mains_threshold.name: Set mains threshold
set_mains_threshold.description: Set current monitoring thresholds for a specific mains leg.

continuous_threshold_pct.name: Continuous threshold (%)
continuous_threshold_pct.description: Percentage of breaker rating for continuous load alerts.

spike_threshold_pct.name: Spike threshold (%)
spike_threshold_pct.description: Percentage of breaker rating for instantaneous spike alerts.

window_duration_m.name: Window duration (minutes)
window_duration_m.description: How long current must stay above threshold before alerting.

cooldown_duration_m.name: Cooldown duration (minutes)
cooldown_duration_m.description: Minutes between repeated alerts for the same mains leg.

monitoring_enabled.name: Monitoring enabled
monitoring_enabled.description: Enable or disable monitoring for this mains leg.

clear_mains_threshold.name: Clear mains threshold
clear_mains_threshold.description: Remove per-mains-leg threshold overrides, reverting to global defaults.

get_monitoring_status.name: Get monitoring status
get_monitoring_status.description: Returns current monitoring state for all tracked circuits and mains legs.

set_global_monitoring.name: Set Global Monitoring
set_global_monitoring.description: Update global monitoring thresholds and notification settings.

continuous_threshold_pct.name: Continuous Threshold
continuous_threshold_pct.description: Percentage of breaker rating for continuous overload detection.

spike_threshold_pct.name: Spike Threshold
spike_threshold_pct.description: Percentage of breaker rating for spike detection.

window_duration_m.name: Window Duration
window_duration_m.description: Minutes of sustained overload before alerting.

cooldown_duration_m.name: Cooldown Duration
cooldown_duration_m.description: Minutes between repeated alerts for the same point.

notify_targets.name: Notification Targets
notify_targets.description: Comma-separated list of notify service targets.

notification_message_template.name: Notification Message Template
notification_message_template.description: Template for notification message body. Placeholders: {name}, {entity_id}, {alert_type}, {current_a}, {breaker_rating_a}, {threshold_pct}, {utilization_pct}, {window_m}.

notification_priority.name: Notification Priority
notification_priority.description: Push notification priority level. Controls interruption behavior on mobile devices (iOS: interruption-level, Android: priority/channel).

test_notification.name: Test Notification
test_notification.description: Send a test notification to all configured targets using sample values.

set_graph_time_horizon.name: Set graph time horizon
set_graph_time_horizon.description: Set the global default time horizon for circuit graphs.

horizon.name: Horizon
horizon.description: Time window preset for graph display.

set_circuit_graph_horizon.name: Set circuit graph horizon
set_circuit_graph_horizon.description: Set a per-circuit time horizon override for graphs.

horizon.name: Horizon
horizon.description: Time window preset for graph display.

clear_circuit_graph_horizon.name: Clear circuit graph horizon
clear_circuit_graph_horizon.description: Remove a per-circuit graph horizon override, reverting to the global default.

circuit_id.name: Circuit ID
circuit_id.description: The circuit identifier to clear the override for.

set_subdevice_graph_horizon.name: Set sub-device graph horizon
set_subdevice_graph_horizon.description: Set a per-sub-device time horizon override for graphs.

horizon.name: Horizon
horizon.description: Time window preset for graph display.

clear_subdevice_graph_horizon.name: Clear sub-device graph horizon
clear_subdevice_graph_horizon.description: Remove a per-sub-device graph horizon override, reverting to the global default.

subdevice_id.name: Sub-device ID
subdevice_id.description: The sub-device identifier to clear the override for.

get_graph_settings.name: Get graph settings
get_graph_settings.description: Returns the current global and per-circuit graph horizon settings.

get_favorites.name: Get favorites
get_favorites.description: Returns the saved cross-panel favorites map keyed by SPAN panel device id.

add_favorite.name: Add favorite
add_favorite.description: Mark a SPAN circuit, battery (BESS), or EV charger (EVSE) as a favorite so it appears in the dashboard's Favorites view.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any sensor of the circuit or sub-device to favorite (current, power, SoC, etc.).

remove_favorite.name: Remove favorite
remove_favorite.description: Remove a circuit or sub-device from the cross-panel Favorites view.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any sensor of the circuit or sub-device to remove from favorites.
